topic.para: Migration from &slea; 15 to &suselinux; 16 uses a new approach based on SUSE Migration Services, a bootable medium that performs migration in stages:

listitem.para: Pre-migration: the medium boots and analyses the existing installation. Problematic settings that cannot be converted automatically (such as &aa; profiles) are flagged. You can choose to accept an incomplete migration or cancel.
Migration: the system boots into a special medium that performs the actual migration.
Post-migration: the migrated system boots and runs optional finalization tasks.

topic.para: Migration of a running system is no longer supported.

important.title: Scope of 16.0 migration support
important.para: &suselinux; 16 supports migration only from &slea; 15 SP7 and does not cover all migration aspects. Full migration support, including additional source releases, is planned for &suselinux; 16.1.
